description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a distinctive V-shaped body, finished in a glossy black color. The body features two visible humbucker pickups, a set of control knobs, and a fixed bridge, all in a metallic or dark finish. The neck is a contrasting light wood with a series of gold or yellow fret markers, and the headstock is angular, matching the bold design of the body. The tuning pegs are arranged in a straight line along one side of the headstock, which is also finished in the same light wood as the neck. The overall design is modern and aggressive, reminiscent of guitars favored in rock or metal genres. This instrument would be a striking visual element in urban settings such as music venues, street performances, or garage bands.
description: A black, V-shaped electric guitar with a light wood neck, gold fret markers, and dual humbucker pickups. Its bold, modern design stands out visually.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the thin, angular V-shaped body and the full length of the light wood neck.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the black V-shaped body, gold fret markers, dual pickups, and control knobs.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, again showing the slim body and neck, with less detail on hardware.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the V-shaped body and the back of the neck and headstock.
attribute_headstock_design: Angular headstock with six inline tuning pegs, no visible logo, finished in light wood.
